title: Autophagic flux analysis
steps: Treat iPSC-derived microglia with 100 nM bafilomycin A1 (Sigma-Aldrich) for 4 hours prior to protein extraction.
Detect LC3B levels by Western blot and quantify the intensity of the LC3-II band using ImageJ.
Calculate autophagic flux as the ratio of LC3-II in bafilomycin-treated cells versus untreated cells.
creator: Federico Bertoli
